title: ci(cbsp21): diff PR changes from merge-base and declare the M6 audit doc
intent: Fix the CBSP21 Patch Manifest Gate false failure on stale PR branches by computing changed files from the PR merge-base instead of diffing the base tip tree directly. Also declare the C2 M6 readiness audit document that this branch adds so the selected manifest matches the real PR scope.
behavior_change: The CBSP21 Gate workflow now computes pull request changed files from merge-base..HEAD, so files added only on main no longer appear as PR changes.

diff_articulation.what_changed: Updates .github/workflows/cbsp21_gate.yml so pull_request runs diff from the merge-base to HEAD before passing changed files into the gate, avoiding false deletions from a stale branch vs newer main. Adds this per-PR manifest covering the workflow change and the existing C2_M6_READINESS_AUDIT.md document on the branch.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: Modifies the CI gate's changed-file computation to use the PR merge-base so manifest validation matches actual PR scope instead of including unrelated main-branch changes, and adds the corresponding per-PR CBSP21 manifest for this branch.

commands_run: git diff --name-only origin/main HEAD -> outputs false base-only files (.cbsp21/patches/wp-002-b-replacement-coverage.json, docs/audit/WP_002_REPLACEMENT_COVERAGE.md) plus the real PR file

MERGE_BASE=$(git merge-base origin/main HEAD) && git diff --name-only "$MERGE_BASE" HEAD -> docs/governance/coordination/C2_M6_READINESS_AUDIT.md before the workflow edit; after the workflow edit, the PR also includes .github/workflows/cbsp21_gate.yml
python scripts/ci/check_cbsp21_gate.py --changed-files $(git diff --name-only "$(git merge-base origin/main HEAD)" HEAD)

files.intent: Compute pull_request changed files from the PR merge-base so CBSP21 manifest selection ignores files added only on main.
files.behavior_change: CBSP21 Gate now diffs merge-base..HEAD for pull_request events instead of base-tip..HEAD.

files.intent: Add the C2 M6 readiness audit document already present on this branch.

architecture_scan.acknowledgement_notes: Scoped CI workflow fix plus PR-local manifest declaration. No runtime application code changed.
